sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12869" key="a)po/klitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπό-κλῐτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n12869.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">declining, waning,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.273e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
